summary: Full frontend E2E testing of Event System Pro (React + MUI). Login, Home, Staff, Competitor, Judging flows verified. Theme persistence, Test Messages, accordion behavior, sort modes, random scoring, submit, duplicate-score dialog, color dialog (top->bottom->auto-close, X-close cancel), and collapsed swatches all behave per spec. No backend (frontend-only app). 33/33 functional assertions passing on the focused clean run.
critical_code_review_comments: JudgingPage.tsx is ~780 lines and includes several internal components (CollapsedNamesRow, DigitSelect, CompetitorRow) plus utility functions. Consider splitting helpers (computeOrder, findDuplicateBib, adjustForDuplicate, generateCouples) into /utils and sub-components into /components for readability and reuse.
Unused import: `CompetitorColorSwatch` is imported in JudgingPage.tsx but never used. Same with `CONTENT_MAX_WIDTH` (imported but not referenced in JudgingPage). Minor cleanup.

CompetitorColorDialog: clicking the backdrop while in 'top' phase auto-saves whatever was previously picked if touchedThisSession is true. This is a subtle UX where backdrop != cancel. Spec only specifies X-close cancels; backdrop behavior is undefined. Consider unifying to 'cancel' for backdrop as well to avoid confusion.

scoreFromDigits uses float division (d[2]/10 + d[3]/100) which can introduce floating-point error (e.g. 0.1 + 0.2). Duplicate detection uses strict equality and adjustForDuplicate uses Math.abs < 0.005 — inconsistent. Recommend always comparing on integer cents (cents = digits packed) to avoid edge-case mismatches.
Excluded-words filter in legionNames.ts includes 'ladd' but 'ladd' is a substring scenario already covered by token split; harmless but redundant.
AppThemeProvider initializes from localStorage but the SSR guard `typeof window === 'undefined'` is irrelevant in CRA — minor noise.

PercentCompleteBar swaps the progress bar for a Submit button at 100% — that means the visual progress at exactly 100% is hidden. If the spec wants the bar to remain visible above the button, this differs.

When 'Assign Random Scores' is selected, the Select control resets its visible value via `value={sortMode === 'random' ? 'bib' : sortMode}` — but after the bulk action sortMode is set to 'raw', so the dropdown shows 'Sort by Raw Score'. Behavior is correct but the value-coalescing logic is unnecessary.

success_rate.frontend: 100% on clean run (16/16); 14/17 in first pass with 3 flaky timing failures (localStorage cleared between browser sessions, and initial query of contest-1 before DOM settled)

context_for_next_testing_agent: Frontend runs at REACT_APP_BACKEND_URL (https://material-md-app.preview.emergentagent.com). All flows verified via Playwright. When testing MUI Select-in-Accordion, always Escape between dropdown opens to avoid menu-overlay timing issues. The browser session is fresh between automation invocations, so don't rely on localStorage persistence across separate sessions — verify within a single session.
verified_features: Login (any credentials) -> /home
Home page renders all 5 required testids
Theme switcher: changing to Dark persists to localStorage key 'event-system-pro.skin-id'
Test Messages: 3 messages (success/warning/problem) shown simultaneously, click-to-dismiss with collapse
Login mounts clear messages (clearMessages called in useEffect)
Staff contest 1/2/3 navigate to /judging; staff-back-home returns to /home
Competitor contests 1/2/3 are disabled (no navigation)
Judging: exactly 20 couples, unique bibs 1-999, sorted ascending by default
No excluded words ('boy','girl','lad','lass','ladd','man','woman') present in generated names
Digit select inside expanded accordion does NOT collapse accordion
score-summary-{bib} reflects latest score immediately in collapsed header
Only one accordion expanded at a time (opening second closes first)
List does NOT re-sort while panel open (frozenOrder preserved)
Assign Random Scores: sets all to 30.0-99.9, sortMode becomes raw, Submit shows at 100%, sorted descending
Submit button navigates to /staff
Color dialog: 'Pick Top Color for {first}' -> after first click 'Pick Bottom Color {first}' -> after second click auto-saves and closes
color-dialog-close (X) cancels without saving
Collapsed leader swatch appears in summary when colors set
Duplicate Score dialog opens when an accordion closes with score matching another couple
duplicate-choose-current raises the closed couple's score by +0.1 (50.00 -> 50.10)
